recommendations:
Bruce Peters

I worked with Adam early in his sales management career. Adam always impressed me with his industry knowledge and sales focus. Importantly, he got the value proposition of the product and was able to articulate this to our customers. Adam was consistently achieving target and bringing high margin business to the organisation. Any organisation would benefit from his services - highly recommended.

Matt Pearce

Adam was a joy to work with. His positive attitude was always refreshing, even if business wasn't so good. Adam has a real skill in building relationships with key prospects whilst in business development and once won, he really ensured that our clients felt like partners. Adam is structured, disciplined and strategic in his approach to business. We worked together for a couple of years and he acted with integrity and honesty throughout, becoming a trusted colleague and lieutenant.
